boundary_strategy.cut_basis: Cluster by responsibility within one deployable; logical responsibility units only — no enforced internal module boundaries, no distributed components (INV6 single-server synchronous mandate)

components.name: Data Store
components.responsibility: Provide durable relational persistence (PostgreSQL) for all application state — freelancer identity, projects, time entries, invoices, and related monetary entities.

components.name: Identity & Auth
components.responsibility: Manage freelancer account creation and authentication by delegating to Google OAuth 2.0, storing only the provider token and user profile reference, and establishing an authenticated session.

components.name: Project Management
components.responsibility: Create, display, edit, and delete the authenticated freelancer's client projects, including the associated client record, project-level currency designation, and project-level billable rate.

components.name: Time Logging
components.responsibility: Accept, persist, and display billable time entries (date, description, hours) against a client project, scoped to the authenticated freelancer.

components.name: Invoice Export
components.responsibility: Aggregate a project's time entries for a selected calendar month into PDF invoice line items, compute monetary totals using the project rate and currency, and stream the PDF to the browser as a file download.

components.name: Web Ingress
components.responsibility: Accept HTTP/HTTPS requests, route them to the appropriate domain component, and serve server-rendered HTML pages to the browser (MPA/SSR entry surface).

edges.reason: Identity & Auth reads and writes the freelancer identity record (E1 — provider token and user profile reference) to the data store.
Project Management persists and retrieves client project records (E2, E5, E6, E7) from the data store.
Project Management scopes all project data to the authenticated freelancer identity — reads the current session to enforce ownership.
Time Logging persists and retrieves time entry records (E3) to the data store, satisfying the durable association with project and freelancer.
Time Logging references a client project to associate each time entry with its owning project (and inherits project-level currency and rate).
Invoice Export queries time entries for a given project and calendar month directly from the data store to aggregate line items.
Invoice Export reads the project's currency designation (E5) and billable rate (E7) and the client record (E6) to populate invoice line items and header.
Web Ingress gates authenticated routes through the identity component — session presence is checked before dispatching to domain views.
Web Ingress dispatches project management page requests to the Project Management component.
Web Ingress dispatches time-logging page requests to the Time Logging component.
Web Ingress dispatches invoice export requests to the Invoice Export component.
